title: Kecskemét, Bács-Kiskun — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kecskemét, Bács-Kiskun: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kecskemét is a city in Bács-Kiskun with a population of 111,411. A city on the Great Plain, known for its Art Nouveau town hall, Mercedes-Benz manufacturing plant, and as the birthplace of composer Zoltán Kodály.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
